root_text.an1.268:1.1: “Aṭṭhānametaṁ, bhikkhave, anavakāso yaṁ diṭṭhisampanno puggalo kañci saṅkhāraṁ niccato upagaccheyya. Netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an1.268:1.2: Ṭhānañca kho etaṁ, bhikkhave, vijjati yaṁ puthujjano kañci saṅkhāraṁ niccato upagaccheyya. Ṭhānametaṁ vijjatī”ti.
root_text.an1.269:1.1: “Aṭṭhānametaṁ, bhikkhave, anavakāso yaṁ diṭṭhisampanno puggalo kañci saṅkhāraṁ sukhato upagaccheyya. Netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an1.269:1.2: Ṭhānañca kho etaṁ, bhikkhave, vijjati yaṁ puthujjano kañci saṅkhāraṁ sukhato upagaccheyya. Ṭhānametaṁ vijjatī”ti.
root_text.an1.270:1.1: “Aṭṭhānametaṁ, bhikkhave, anavakāso yaṁ diṭṭhisampanno puggalo kañci dhammaṁ attato upagaccheyya. Netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an1.270:1.2: Ṭhānañca kho etaṁ, bhikkhave, vijjati yaṁ puthujjano kañci dhammaṁ attato upagaccheyya. Ṭhānametaṁ vijjatī”ti.
root_text.an1.271:1.1: “Aṭṭhānametaṁ, bhikkhave, anavakāso yaṁ diṭṭhisampanno puggalo mātaraṁ jīvitā voropeyya. Netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an1.271:1.2: Ṭhānañca kho, bhikkhave, vijjati yaṁ puthujjano mātaraṁ jīvitā voropeyya. Ṭhānametaṁ vijjatī”ti.
root_text.an1.272:1.1: “Aṭṭhānametaṁ, bhikkhave, anavakāso yaṁ diṭṭhisampanno puggalo pitaraṁ jīvitā voropeyya. Netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an1.272:1.2: Ṭhānañca kho etaṁ, bhikkhave, vijjati yaṁ puthujjano pitaraṁ jīvitā voropeyya. Ṭhānametaṁ vijjatī”ti.
root_text.an1.273:1.1: “Aṭṭhānametaṁ, bhikkhave, anavakāso yaṁ diṭṭhisampanno puggalo arahantaṁ jīvitā voropeyya. Netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an1.273:1.2: Ṭhānañca kho etaṁ, bhikkhave, vijjati yaṁ puthujjano arahantaṁ jīvitā voropeyya. Ṭhānametaṁ vijjatī”ti.
root_text.an1.274:1.1: “Aṭṭhānametaṁ, bhikkhave, anavakāso yaṁ diṭṭhisampanno puggalo tathāgatassa paduṭṭhacitto lohitaṁ uppādeyya. Netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an1.274:1.2: Ṭhānañca kho etaṁ, bhikkhave, vijjati yaṁ puthujjano tathāgatassa paduṭṭhacitto lohitaṁ uppādeyya. Ṭhānametaṁ vijjatī”ti.
root_text.an1.275:1.1: “Aṭṭhānametaṁ, bhikkhave, anavakāso yaṁ diṭṭhisampanno puggalo saṅghaṁ bhindeyya. Netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an1.275:1.2: Ṭhānañca kho etaṁ, bhikkhave, vijjati yaṁ puthujjano saṅghaṁ bhindeyya. Ṭhānametaṁ vijjatī”ti.
root_text.an1.276:1.1: “Aṭṭhānametaṁ, bhikkhave, anavakāso yaṁ diṭṭhisampanno puggalo aññaṁ satthāraṁ uddiseyya. Netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an1.276:1.2: Ṭhānañca kho etaṁ, bhikkhave, vijjati yaṁ puthujjano aññaṁ satthāraṁ uddiseyya. Ṭhānametaṁ vijjatī”ti.
root_text.an1.277:1.1: “Aṭṭhānametaṁ, bhikkhave, anavakāso yaṁ ekissā lokadhātuyā dve arahanto sammāsambuddhā apubbaṁ acarimaṁ uppajjeyyuṁ. Netaṁ ṭhānaṁ vijjati.
root_text.an1.277:1.2: Ṭhānañca kho etaṁ, bhikkhave, vijjati yaṁ ekissā lokadhātuyā ekova arahaṁ sammāsambuddho uppajjeyya. Ṭhānametaṁ vijjatī”ti.

translation_text.an1.268:1.1: “It is impossible, mendicants, it cannot happen for an individual accomplished in view to take any condition as permanent. That is not possible.
translation_text.an1.268:1.2: But it is possible for an ordinary person to take some condition as permanent. That is possible.”
translation_text.an1.269:1.1: “It is impossible, mendicants, it cannot happen for an individual accomplished in view to take any condition as pleasant.
translation_text.an1.269:1.2: But it is possible for an ordinary person to take some condition as pleasant.”
translation_text.an1.270:1.1: “It is impossible, mendicants, it cannot happen for an individual accomplished in view to take anything as self.
translation_text.an1.270:1.2: But it is possible for an ordinary person to take something as self.”
translation_text.an1.271:1.1: “It is impossible, mendicants, it cannot happen for an individual accomplished in view to murder their mother.
translation_text.an1.271:1.2: But it is possible for an ordinary person to murder their mother.”
translation_text.an1.272:1.1: “It is impossible, mendicants, it cannot happen for an individual accomplished in view to murder their father.
translation_text.an1.272:1.2: But it is possible for an ordinary person to murder their father.”
translation_text.an1.273:1.1: “It is impossible, mendicants, it cannot happen for an individual accomplished in view to murder a perfected one.
translation_text.an1.273:1.2: But it is possible for an ordinary person to murder a perfected one.”
translation_text.an1.274:1.1: “It is impossible, mendicants, it cannot happen for an individual accomplished in view to injure a Realized One with malicious intent.
translation_text.an1.274:1.2: But it is possible for an ordinary person to injure a Realized One with malicious intent.”
translation_text.an1.275:1.1: “It is impossible, mendicants, it cannot happen for an individual accomplished in view to cause a schism in the Saṅgha.
translation_text.an1.275:1.2: But it is possible for an ordinary person to cause a schism in the Saṅgha.”
translation_text.an1.276:1.1: “It is impossible, mendicants, it cannot happen for an individual accomplished in view to dedicate themselves to another teacher.
translation_text.an1.276:1.2: But it is possible for an ordinary person to dedicate themselves to another teacher.”
translation_text.an1.277:1.1: “It is impossible, mendicants, it cannot happen for two perfected ones, fully awakened Buddhas to arise in the same solar system at the same time.
translation_text.an1.277:1.2: But it is possible for just one perfected one, a fully awakened Buddha, to arise in one solar system.”
